name: Cold Blooded: The Clutter Family Murders
original_name: Cold Blooded: The Clutter Family Murders
overview: The story of the brutal murder of the Clutter family in a small Kansas town in 1959, the resulting investigation, convictions and executions of Perry Smith and Richard Hickock, chronicled in Truman Capote's landmark book, In Cold Blood.

trailers.title: IDFA 2017 | Trailer | Cold Blooded: The Clutter Family Murders
